title: potato -> strawberries
body:
# Potato -> Strawberries
**time to farm strawberries!**

A simple little texture pack that turns 1.8.9 potatoes into strawberries! Made for Hypixel Skyblock farming funsies, but works anywhere else.

![pack view](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13e3c5e1e211d03a269be672955b930da4d2b394.png)


**SHWORDS CONFIG**</br>
To change things correctly in Hypixel Skyblock, you can use /shwords with the Skyhanni mod to change all instances of 'potato' to 'strawberry':
- Pythagorean Potato Hoe -> Sierpinski Strawberry Hoe
- Baked Potato -> Chocolate Strawberry
- Potatoes -> Strawberries
- Potato -> Strawberry
- potatoes -> strawberries

in that order, with default settings.


</br>
</br>
</br>

_credit to ByBoxi for original strawberry texture_
